title: phyllanthus symplocoides
intro: Phyllanthus symplocoides, also known as Dhamasha or Dhundal, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus symplocoides include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Phyllanthus symplocoides is often prepared as a decoction or tincture for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
